_meta.description: Seed data for Britt's Food System web app. Import into Supabase. Recipe categories: smoothie, hot, quick, guilty (breakfast); bowls, wraps, soups, lquick (lunch); snacks; family, sides (dinner); solo (Just for Me — salmon recipes are the example, not the rule). Cuisines: med, mex, asi, ind. Tags are free-form chips.

oat_base: 1/2 cup rolled oats + 3/4 cup milk + 2 tbsp chia seeds + pinch salt. The flavor layer is what changes. Make 3-4 jars of each pick.

oat_flavors.name: PB&J
oat_flavors.desc: Peanut butter, strawberry jam, banana slices
oat_flavors.recipe: Add to base: 1 tbsp peanut butter, 1 tbsp strawberry jam, stir well. Top in the morning with sliced banana and a drizzle of extra PB. The jam melts in overnight — tastes like dessert.

oat_flavors.name: Dark Chocolate Raspberry
oat_flavors.recipe: Add to base: 1 tbsp cocoa powder, 1 tsp honey, handful of frozen raspberries (they thaw overnight). Top with a few dark chocolate chips. Feels indulgent, isn't.

oat_flavors.name: Peach Cobbler
oat_flavors.desc: Canned peaches, brown sugar, cinnamon, vanilla
oat_flavors.recipe: Add to base: 1/4 tsp cinnamon, 1/4 tsp vanilla extract, 1 tsp brown sugar. Stir in a few spoonfuls of canned diced peaches (in juice, not syrup). Top with granola in the morning for the cobbler crunch.

oat_flavors.name: Tropical
oat_flavors.recipe: Swap base milk for: 1/2 coconut milk + 1/4 regular milk. Add frozen mango chunks, squeeze of lime. Tastes nothing like health food.

oat_flavors.name: Apple Pie
oat_flavors.desc: Grated apple, cinnamon, maple syrup, walnuts
oat_flavors.recipe: Add to base: 1/2 grated apple (softens overnight), 1/2 tsp cinnamon, 1 tsp maple syrup. Top with crushed walnuts. Add a pinch of nutmeg if you have it.

oat_flavors.name: Matcha Honey
oat_flavors.desc: Matcha powder, honey, vanilla, white chocolate chips
oat_flavors.recipe: Add to base: 1 tsp matcha powder, 1 tsp honey, 1/4 tsp vanilla. Whisk the matcha into a little warm milk first so it dissolves, then stir into the jar. Top with a few white chocolate chips.

recipes.name: Wild Blueberry + Almond Butter
recipes.recipe: Blend: 1 cup frozen wild blueberries · 1 frozen banana · 1 tbsp almond butter · 1 cup oat milk · 1 tbsp hemp seeds · big handful frozen spinach (you won't taste it). Optional: scoop vanilla protein powder. Blend until smooth.
steps: Add 1 cup frozen wild blueberries, 1 frozen banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 cup oat milk, 1 tbsp hemp seeds, and a big handful of frozen spinach to a blender (you won't taste it).
Optional: add a scoop of vanilla protein powder.
Blend until smooth.

recipes.name: Chocolate PB Protein Shake
recipes.recipe: Blend: 1 frozen banana · 1 tbsp peanut butter · 1 tbsp cocoa powder · 1 cup oat milk · 1 scoop chocolate protein powder · handful of ice. Tastes like a Frosty. Has 30g of protein.
steps: Add the frozen banana, peanut butter, cocoa powder, oat milk, chocolate protein powder, and a handful of ice to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately — tastes like a Frosty!

recipes.name: Strawberry Coconut Smoothie Bowl
recipes.hint: Thicker · use a spoon · more satisfying
recipes.recipe: Blend thick: 1.5 cups frozen strawberries · 1/2 frozen banana · 1/2 cup coconut milk only (keep it thick). Pour into bowl. Top with: granola, sliced fresh strawberries, drizzle of honey. The toppings are the whole point.
steps: Blend together 1.5 cups frozen strawberries, 1/2 frozen banana, and 1/2 cup coconut milk — keep it thick.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with granola, sliced fresh strawberries, and a drizzle of honey. The toppings are the whole point.

recipes.name: Green Goddess Bowl
recipes.recipe: Blend thick: 1 cup frozen mango · 1 frozen banana · 2 big handfuls frozen spinach · 1/2 cup coconut milk. Top with: kiwi, hemp seeds, chia seeds, drizzle of almond butter, granola. The mango and banana completely mask the spinach.
steps: Blend thick: 1 cup frozen mango, 1 frozen banana, 2 big handfuls frozen spinach, and 1/2 cup coconut milk.
Top with: kiwi, hemp seeds, chia seeds, drizzle of almond butter, and granola.

recipes.name: Peanut Butter Banana
recipes.recipe: Blend: 1 frozen banana · 2 tbsp peanut butter · 1 cup oat milk · 1 tbsp honey · handful of ice. Simple and always works. Add protein powder if you want more staying power.
steps: Add 1 frozen banana, 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 cup oat milk, 1 tbsp honey, and a handful of ice to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Add protein powder if you want more staying power.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Scramble
recipes.hint: 10 min · spinach, feta, sun-dried tomato · Britt only
recipes.recipe: Scramble 3 eggs in olive oil with a handful of baby spinach, 2 tbsp crumbled feta, and a few sliced sun-dried tomatoes (oil-packed jar). Season with oregano, salt, pepper. Serve with toasted whole grain bread. Tastes like brunch at a café.
steps: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 3 eggs and scramble together with a handful of baby spinach, 2 tbsp crumbled feta, and a few sliced sun-dried tomatoes (oil-packed jar).
Season with oregano, salt, and pepper.
Serve with toasted whole grain bread.

recipes.name: Huevos-Style Skillet
recipes.hint: 12 min · eggs in spiced tomato sauce · Britt only
recipes.recipe: Heat 1/2 cup salsa in a small pan until bubbling. Add 1/2 cup black beans, stir. Make 2 small wells, crack an egg into each. Cover, cook 4–5 min until whites are set. Top with avocado, hot sauce. Eat with tortillas.
steps: Heat 1/2 cup salsa in a small pan until bubbling.
Add 1/2 cup black beans, stir.
Make 2 small wells, crack an egg into each.
Cover, cook 4–5 min until whites are set.
Top with avocado, hot sauce.
Eat with tortillas.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast (three ways)
recipes.recipe: Toast whole grain bread. Smash 1/2 avocado on top with salt + lemon. Then pick: Mediterranean — feta + cherry tomato + oregano. Mexican — hot sauce + cilantro + everything bagel. Rich — chili crisp + sesame seeds + soy drizzle.
steps: Toast whole grain bread.
Smash 1/2 avocado on top with salt + lemon.
Then pick a direction — Mediterranean: feta + cherry tomato + oregano. Mexican: hot sauce + cilantro + everything bagel. Rich: chili crisp + sesame seeds + soy drizzle.

recipes.name: Banana + Nut Butter + Hemp Seeds
recipes.recipe: Slice a banana, spread nut butter on each piece, sprinkle hemp seeds. Hemp seeds add 10g protein with zero effort and zero flavor disruption. Eat while figuring out if you're actually hungry enough for a real breakfast.
steps: Slice a banana.
Spread nut butter on each piece.
Sprinkle hemp seeds.
Eat while figuring out if you're actually hungry enough for a real breakfast.

recipes.name: Bacon + Egg + Avocado Plate
recipes.recipe: 2–3 strips bacon. 2 fried or scrambled eggs. 1/2 avocado sliced with salt + lime. Handful of fruit on the side. The bacon is front and center, the eggs and avocado do the nutritional heavy lifting. This is the breakfast that doesn't feel like a compromise.
steps: Cook 2–3 strips of bacon until done to your liking.
Fry or scramble 2 eggs.
Slice 1/2 avocado and season with salt and a squeeze of lime.
Plate everything together with a handful of fruit on the side.

recipes.name: Protein Waffles
recipes.recipe: Use your normal waffle mix but add 1 scoop vanilla protein powder to the batter and swap half the liquid for oat milk. Goes from ~5g protein to ~20g. Top with fresh berries + small drizzle of maple syrup. Serve alongside bacon — not a trade-off, an upgrade.
steps: Use your normal waffle mix but add 1 scoop vanilla protein powder to the batter and swap half the liquid for oat milk.
Cook waffles according to your mix's instructions.
Top with fresh berries + a small drizzle of maple syrup.
Serve alongside bacon — not a trade-off, an upgrade.

recipes.name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipes.recipe: No optimization needed. Cinnamon rolls on Saturday morning are a ritual, not a nutrition problem. If you want, pair with a protein smoothie or some eggs alongside to balance the sugar spike — but don't over-engineer this one.
steps: No optimization needed. Cinnamon rolls on Saturday morning are a ritual, not a nutrition problem.
If you want, pair with a protein smoothie or some eggs alongside to balance the sugar spike — but don't over-engineer this one.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl
recipes.recipe: Base: Farro or brown rice. Protein: Chickpeas (from can or roasted Sunday). Veg: Roasted sweet potato + baby spinach. Sauce: Tahini + lemon + water + garlic, thinned to a drizzle. Extras: Kalamata olives, cucumber, crumbled feta, red onion.
steps: Cook your base: prepare farro or brown rice according to package directions.
Prepare your protein: use chickpeas straight from the can, or use batch-roasted chickpeas if prepped on Sunday.
Roast the sweet potato until tender.
Build the bowl with the roasted sweet potato and a handful of baby spinach.
Make the tahini sauce: whisk together tahini, lemon juice, water, and garlic, thinning with additional water until it reaches a drizzle consistency.
Top the bowl with Kalamata olives, sliced cucumber, crumbled feta, and red onion.
Drizzle the tahini sauce over the assembled bowl and serve.

recipes.name: Mexican Rice Bowl
recipes.recipe: Base: Brown rice. Protein: Black beans warmed with cumin + garlic powder. Veg: Corn (frozen, microwaved), cherry tomatoes. Sauce: Salsa + squeeze of lime. Extras: Avocado, shredded cheese, cilantro, hot sauce. Add leftover chicken to make it more substantial.
steps: Cook brown rice according to package instructions and use as the base of the bowl.
Warm black beans with cumin and garlic powder.
Microwave frozen corn until heated through.
Halve cherry tomatoes and set aside.
Mix salsa with a squeeze of lime juice to make the sauce.
Assemble the bowl: start with the brown rice base, then top with black beans, corn, and cherry tomatoes.
Finish with avocado, shredded cheese, cilantro, and hot sauce. Add leftover chicken to make it more substantial.

recipes.name: Sesame Noodle Bowl
recipes.recipe: Cook soba noodles (8 min), rinse cold. Sauce: 2 tbsp peanut butter + 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tsp sesame oil + 1 tsp rice vinegar + splash of water. Toss noodles. Top with: edamame, purple cabbage, cucumber, green onion, sesame seeds. Better as leftovers.
steps: Cook soba noodles for 8 minutes, then rinse with cold water.
Make the sauce: combine 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp sesame oil, 1 tsp rice vinegar, and a splash of water.
Toss the noodles in the sauce.
Top with edamame, purple cabbage, cucumber, green onion, and sesame seeds.
Better as leftovers.

recipes.name: Spiced Lentil Bowl
recipes.recipe: Reheat a portion of batch lentil soup. Serve over rice. Top with: diced cucumber + squeeze of lemon + pinch of cumin. Add cilantro and a drizzle of chili oil. Feels like a real restaurant lunch.
steps: Reheat a portion of batch lentil soup.
Serve over rice.
Top with diced cucumber, a squeeze of lemon, and a pinch of cumin.
Add cilantro and a drizzle of chili oil.

recipes.name: Smashed Chickpea Wrap
recipes.recipe: Drain + rinse a can of chickpeas. Smash roughly with a fork. Mix in olive oil, lemon, cumin, salt, pepper. Spread on a large tortilla with baby spinach, sliced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, feta. Roll tight. Shockingly satisfying for 5 minutes of effort.
steps: Drain and rinse a can of chickpeas.
Smash roughly with a fork.
Mix in olive oil, lemon, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Spread on a large tortilla with baby spinach, sliced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and feta.
Roll tight.

recipes.name: Salmon Lettuce Wraps
recipes.recipe: Flake leftover baked salmon. Toss with soy sauce, sesame oil, lime juice, a little sriracha. Spoon into butter lettuce leaves. Top with: shredded purple cabbage, green onion, sesame seeds, julienned carrot. This is why you always make extra salmon at dinner.
steps: Flake leftover baked salmon.
Toss with soy sauce, sesame oil, lime juice, and a little sriracha.
Spoon into butter lettuce leaves.
Top with: shredded purple cabbage, green onion, sesame seeds, and julienned carrot.

recipes.name: Black Bean + Avocado Quesadilla
recipes.recipe: Fill a large tortilla with: canned black beans (drained), shredded cheese, sliced avocado, spoonful of salsa. Fold in half, cook in a dry pan 3 min per side until crispy. Cut into wedges. Add spinach for yourself.
steps: Fill a large tortilla with: canned black beans (drained), shredded cheese, sliced avocado, and a spoonful of salsa.
Fold the tortilla in half.
Cook in a dry pan for 3 min per side until crispy.
Cut into wedges.
Add spinach for yourself.

recipes.name: Red Lentil Soup
recipes.recipe: Sauté 1 diced onion + 3 garlic cloves in olive oil. Add 1 cup red lentils, 1 can diced tomatoes, 4 cups veggie broth, 1 tsp cumin + 1 tsp smoked paprika + 1/2 tsp turmeric + salt. Simmer 25 min. Squeeze of lemon before serving. Portion into 4 containers. Reheats perfectly.
steps: Sauté 1 diced onion and 3 garlic cloves in olive oil.
Add 1 cup red lentils, 1 can diced tomatoes, 4 cups veggie broth, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp turmeric, and salt.
Simmer for 25 min.
Squeeze of lemon before serving.
Portion into 4 containers.

recipes.name: Miso Broth with Noodles
recipes.recipe: Bring 2 cups broth to a simmer. Stir in 1 tbsp white miso (don't boil after). Add rice noodles, sliced mushrooms, baby spinach, 1 tsp soy sauce. Top with: soft-boiled egg (Britt only), green onion, sesame oil drizzle, chili crisp.
steps: Bring 2 cups broth to a simmer.
Stir in 1 tbsp white miso — don't boil after.
Add rice noodles, sliced mushrooms, baby spinach, and 1 tsp soy sauce.
Top with: soft-boiled egg (Britt only), green onion, a drizzle of sesame oil, and chili crisp.

recipes.name: Mezze Plate
recipes.recipe: Hummus · olives · pita or crackers · sliced cucumber + cherry tomatoes · handful of nuts · feta if you have it. This is a real lunch, not a snack plate. The hummus (protein) + nuts (fat) + veg (fiber) combo keeps you full. Your nothing-in-the-fridge emergency lunch.
steps: Arrange hummus, olives, pita or crackers, sliced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, a handful of nuts, and feta (if you have it) on a plate.
This is a real lunch, not a snack plate. The hummus (protein) + nuts (fat) + veg (fiber) combo keeps you full. Your nothing-in-the-fridge emergency lunch.

recipes.name: Salmon + Rice + Avocado
recipes.recipe: Reheat rice. Flake salmon on top cold or warm — both work. Add sliced avocado, drizzle of soy sauce or lemon, sesame seeds. Done. This is why the cook-alongside system works: make extra so you always have this for the next day.
steps: Reheat rice.
Flake salmon on top cold or warm — both work.
Add sliced avocado, drizzle of soy sauce or lemon, sesame seeds.
Done. This is why the cook-alongside system works: make extra so you always have this for the next day.

recipes.name: Edamame with Sea Salt
recipes.recipe: Keep shelled frozen edamame in the freezer always. Microwave 1 cup for 3 minutes. Toss with sea salt. Also good with: everything bagel seasoning, chili lime salt, or soy sauce + sesame oil drizzle. 17g protein from a snack.
steps: Keep shelled frozen edamame in the freezer always.
Microwave 1 cup for 3 minutes.
Toss with sea salt.
Also good with: everything bagel seasoning, chili lime salt, or soy sauce + sesame oil drizzle.

recipes.name: Nut Butter + Apple or Banana
recipes.recipe: Almond or peanut butter. Apple or banana. The fat + fiber + natural sugar combo is the most stabilizing snack combo there is. Keep a jar accessible — not buried in the pantry.
steps: Choose your nut butter — almond or peanut butter — and keep a jar accessible, not buried in the pantry.
Pair with an apple or banana and enjoy the fat + fiber + natural sugar combo, the most stabilizing snack combo there is.

recipes.name: Veggies + Hummus
recipes.recipe: Cut carrots, celery, cucumber, and bell pepper on Sunday. Store in water in containers. This snack only happens when the veg is already cut. It never happens when you have to cut it first. Cut the veg.
steps: Cut carrots, celery, cucumber, and bell pepper on Sunday.
Store in water in containers.
This snack only happens when the veg is already cut. It never happens when you have to cut it first. Cut the veg.

recipes.name: Cheese + Crackers + Fruit
recipes.recipe: Block of cheddar or pepper jack, whole grain crackers, handful of grapes or apple slices. The adult snack plate that feels indulgent and isn't. Keep a block of cheese in the fridge at all times.
steps: Slice a block of cheddar or pepper jack cheese.
Arrange on a plate with whole grain crackers and a handful of grapes or apple slices.

recipes.name: Seaweed Snacks + Nuts
recipes.recipe: Roasted seaweed snack packs + a small handful of almonds or cashews. Covers the salty crunch craving without chips. Good pantry staple for when you want something savory mid-afternoon.
steps: Grab roasted seaweed snack packs and a small handful of almonds or cashews.
Enjoy as a satisfying savory snack — no prep needed.

recipes.name: Greek Chicken Thighs
recipes.recipe: Marinate chicken thighs in: olive oil, lemon juice + zest, garlic, dried oregano, salt, pepper (even 30 min works). Roast at 425° for 25–30 min skin-side up. Serve with roasted potatoes or pita, cucumber, olives. Your salmon: same seasoning on a fillet, same pan, pull it out 10 min earlier.
steps: Marinate chicken thighs in: olive oil, lemon juice + zest, garlic, dried oregano, salt, and pepper (even 30 min works).
Roast at 425° for 25–30 min skin-side up.
Serve with roasted potatoes or pita, cucumber, olives.
Your salmon: same seasoning on a fillet, same pan, pull it out 10 min earlier.

recipes.name: Taco Night (with your upgrade)
recipes.hint: Your existing go-to · personal fiber boost
recipes.recipe: Keep making these exactly how you do. For yourself: add a side of spiced black beans + rice to bump fiber significantly, pile on extra avocado, add pickled red onion. Family gets the tacos they love, you get a more complete meal. No extra cooking required.
steps: Keep making these exactly how you do.
For yourself: add a side of spiced black beans + rice to bump fiber significantly.
Pile on extra avocado.
Add pickled red onion.
Family gets the tacos they love, you get a more complete meal. No extra cooking required.

recipes.name: Teriyaki Chicken + Rice
recipes.recipe: Pan-sear chicken thighs or breast. Make quick teriyaki: 3 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tbsp honey + 1 tsp sesame oil + 1 tsp cornstarch. Pour over chicken in last 5 min. Serve over rice with steamed broccoli. Your salmon: same sauce, bake at 400° for 12–15 min while chicken cooks.
steps: Pan-sear chicken thighs or breast.
Make quick teriyaki: combine 3 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tbsp honey + 1 tsp sesame oil + 1 tsp cornstarch.
Pour sauce over chicken in the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli.
Your salmon: same sauce, bake at 400° for 12–15 min while chicken cooks.

recipes.name: Butter Chicken (family) + Chickpea Version (you)
recipes.hint: Make both at once · same spice profile
recipes.recipe: Make your normal butter chicken for the family. Separately: jar of tikka masala sauce + 2 cans chickpeas, simmer 15 min. You eat more fiber, they eat what they love. Same spice, same dinner table, different bowls.
steps: Make your normal butter chicken for the family.
Separately: combine a jar of tikka masala sauce and 2 cans chickpeas and simmer for 15 minutes.
You eat more fiber, they eat what they love — same spice, same dinner table, different bowls.

recipes.name: White Bean + Spinach Pasta
recipes.recipe: Cook pasta. While it cooks: sauté garlic in olive oil, add 1 can cannellini beans, 1 can diced tomatoes, big handful spinach, salt, pepper, chili flake. Toss with pasta + splash of pasta water. Top with parmesan. The beans disappear into the sauce. Kids don't notice.
steps: Cook pasta, reserving a splash of pasta water before draining.
While the pasta cooks, sauté garlic in olive oil.
Add 1 can cannellini beans and 1 can diced tomatoes to the pan.
Add a big handful of spinach, then season with salt, pepper, and chili flake.
Toss the sauce with the cooked pasta and a splash of pasta water.
Top with parmesan.

recipes.name: Simple Arugula Side Salad
recipes.recipe: Handful arugula + cherry tomatoes + shaved parmesan + lemon juice + olive oil + salt. 3 minutes. Turns any dinner into a more complete meal. Arugula is more interesting than romaine and wilts less.
steps: Combine a handful of arugula, cherry tomatoes, and shaved parmesan in a bowl.
Squeeze lemon juice over the top and drizzle with olive oil.
Season with salt and toss to combine.

recipes.name: Quick Spiced Black Beans
recipes.recipe: Drain and rinse a can of black beans. Heat in a small saucepan with a splash of water, cumin, garlic powder, salt. 5 minutes. Add these as your personal side to any Mexican-ish dinner. Adds 15g fiber to your plate without touching the family's food.
steps: Drain and rinse a can of black beans.
Heat in a small saucepan with a splash of water, cumin, garlic powder, and salt for 5 minutes.
Add these as your personal side to any Mexican-ish dinner — adds 15g fiber to your plate without touching the family's food.

recipes.name: Roasted Broccoli
recipes.hint: 20 min · the vegetable that converts skeptics
recipes.recipe: Toss broccoli florets in olive oil, salt, garlic powder. Roast at 425° for 20 min until edges are dark and crispy. The crispy edges are everything. Kids who won't touch steamed broccoli often eat this version. Reheats well — keep in Sunday prep rotation.
steps: Toss broccoli florets in olive oil, salt, and garlic powder.
Roast at 425° for 20 min until edges are dark and crispy.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Salmon
recipes.recipe: Rub fillet with olive oil, minced garlic, dried oregano, lemon zest, salt, pepper. Top with a few sliced olives and cherry tomatoes. Bake 400° for 13 min. Serve with roasted veg or a grain bowl. Goes with Greek chicken night for the family.
steps: Rub fillet with olive oil, minced garlic, dried oregano, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.
Top with a few sliced olives and cherry tomatoes.
Bake at 400° for 13 minutes.
Serve with roasted veg or a grain bowl.

recipes.name: Miso-Glazed Salmon
recipes.hint: Soy, miso, honey — the best one on the list
recipes.recipe: Mix: 1 tbsp white miso + 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tsp honey + 1/2 tsp sesame oil. Spread on salmon fillet. Bake 400° for 12–14 min. Broil last 2 min for caramelized top. Serve over rice with edamame. The miso caramelizes into something that tastes like a restaurant made it.
steps: Mix together 1 tbsp white miso, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp honey, and 1/2 tsp sesame oil.
Spread the glaze on the salmon fillet.
Bake at 400° for 12–14 minutes.
Broil for the last 2 minutes for a caramelized top.
Serve over rice with edamame.

recipes.name: Chili Lime Salmon
recipes.recipe: Rub with: olive oil, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, salt, cayenne. Squeeze lime over top. Bake 400° for 13 min. Serve over rice with avocado and black beans. Goes on taco night alongside the family's ground beef. Leftovers make great lettuce wraps for lunch.
steps: Rub the salmon fillet with olive oil, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and cayenne.
Squeeze lime over the top.
Bake at 400° for 13 minutes.
Serve over rice with avocado and black beans.

recipes.name: Simple Lemon-Dill
recipes.recipe: Olive oil, salt, pepper, dried dill, lemon slices on top. Bake 400° for 13 min. This is the I-don't-know-what-cuisine-we're-doing-tonight default. Goes with literally everything.
steps: Drizzle olive oil over the salmon fillet and season with salt and pepper.
Sprinkle dried dill on top, then lay lemon slices over the fish.
Bake at 400° for 13 minutes.

recipes.name: Garlic Herb Butter Salmon
recipes.recipe: Mix 2 tbsp softened butter with 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp fresh or dried parsley, pinch of red chili flake. Spread over salmon fillet. Bake 400° for 13–15 min. The butter bastes the fish as it cooks. Serve with roasted veg or crusty bread to scoop up the sauce.
steps: Mix 2 tbsp softened butter with 2 minced garlic cloves, 1 tbsp fresh or dried parsley, and a pinch of red chili flake.
Spread the garlic herb butter over the salmon fillet.
Bake at 400° for 13–15 min — the butter bastes the fish as it cooks.
Serve with roasted veg or crusty bread to scoop up the sauce.
